title: arnica rotundifolia
intro: Arnica rotundifolia, also known as mountain arnica or lesser arnica, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Arnica rotundifolia lie in its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic compounds, which make it effective in treating wounds, bruises, and swelling. The health benefits of using Arnica rotundifolia include reducing pain and inflammation, promoting wound healing, and improving skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Arnica rotundifolia include topical creams, gels, and ointments, as well as infused oils and teas, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
